name: Material Essence Disruptor (Greater)
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence. Attempt to counteract an active arcane or primal spell within 60 feet, with a [[/r 1d20+18]]{+18} counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 6.
